content.text:
<recommended_plugins>
Here is a list of plugins that are available but not installed. If the user's query would benefit from one of these plugins, use the `request_plugin_install` tool to suggest that they install it. Pass the parenthesized ID as `plugin_id`. For example, suggest the Google Drive plugin if the query could possibly be better answered with access to Google Drive.

- Atlassian Rovo (atlassian-rovo@openai-curated-remote)
- Box (box@openai-curated-remote)
- Figma (figma@openai-curated-remote)
- Gmail (gmail@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Calendar (google-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Drive (google-drive@openai-curated-remote)
- Notion (notion@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Calendar (outlook-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Email (outlook-email@openai-curated-remote)
- SharePoint (sharepoint@openai-curated-remote)
- Slack (slack@openai-curated-remote)
- Teams (teams@openai-curated-remote)
</recommended_plugins>

Review the code changes against the base branch 'main'. The merge base commit for this comparison is 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc. Run `git diff 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc` to inspect the changes relative to main. Provide prioritized, actionable findings.

input.input: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,220p' /Users/cysp/.agents/skills/code-review/SKILL.md && printf '\\n---MEMORY HITS---\\n' && rg -n \"cyspbot.*review|branch-diff|code review\" /Users/cysp/.codex/memories/MEMORY.md | head -30","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,34p' /Users/cysp/.codex/memories/MEMORY.md; printf '\\n--- git ---\\n'; git rev-parse 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc; git status --short; git log --oneline 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc..HEAD; git diff --stat 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc; git diff --name-only 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git diff 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc -- workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src packages/oidc packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/src vitest.config.ts package.json","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":50000}); text(r.output)
const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"corepack pnpm test -- --run","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":1000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(JSON.stringify(r))
const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"corepack pnpm run check","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":1000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(JSON.stringify(r))

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git diff 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc -- docs/service-contract.md docs/implementation.md README.md CONTEXT.md test/token-policy-matching.test.ts | sed -n '1,1200p'","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":50000}); text(r.output)
